rationale: Removing xtrace from shell scripts; CI/build scripting change with no spec behavior involved.
Missing header file in release tarball; packaging/build issue with no spec behavior involved.
Upgrading CI Evergreen tasks to Ubuntu 18.04; CI infrastructure change, no spec behavior.
Improvement issuetype, Issue split DRIVERS-996; proactive spec rollout for Versioned/Stable API, not a nonconformance bug.
Issue split DRIVERS-1649; renaming test option string 'acceptAPIVersion2' to match spec spelling, test infrastructure fix.
Issue split DRIVERS-1505; test failure because $listLocalSessions unsupported in API v1, fixing spec test compatibility.
Depends DRIVERS-1594; Versioned API database aggregation test only works on 4.9+ servers, test infrastructure fix.
Issue split DRIVERS-1595; adding Versioned API test for abortTransaction, test infrastructure update.
Issue split DRIVERS-1561; removing skipReason from estimatedDocumentCount test in versioned API, test infrastructure update.
Issue split DRIVERS-1633, Improvement; using 'hello' command with API version declared, proactive spec rollout not a bug.
Issue split DRIVERS-1720, Improvement; requiring Stable API options in getMore/transaction-continuing commands, spec rollout.
Incorrect ordering of prelude headers in codebase and docs; internal C++ build/documentation fix, no spec behavior.
Issue split DRIVERS-1653; adding test for security-sensitive command monitoring event redaction, test infrastructure.
Hard-coded libdir in pkg-config scripts breaks lib64; build/packaging issue, no spec behavior.
Issue split DRIVERS-1771; testing against MongoDB 5.0 servers, CI/test infrastructure expansion, not a spec nonconformance.
calc_release_version.py produces different output for Python2 vs Python3; build tooling bug, no spec behavior.
version_from_string() throws std::logic_error instead of mongocxx::logic_error; API documentation/exception type mismatch, not a spec conformance issue.
Issue split DRIVERS-1741; adding Stable API connection examples for documentation, docs task not a spec nonconformance.
Git merge markers left in documentation file; documentation cleanup, no spec behavior involved.
Issue split DRIVERS-1875; syncing BSON corpus tests for new binary subtype 7, test infrastructure update.
CMake install script deletes unrelated empty directories; build/install script bug, no spec behavior.
Load balancer spec requires serviceId in command monitoring events; driver missing this field, direct spec rule violation.
Issue split DRIVERS-1820, Improvement; raising client error for snapshot sessions on <5.0 servers, proactive spec rollout.
Issue split DRIVERS-1819, Improvement; disabling writes on snapshot sessions, proactive spec rollout not a bug.
Issue split DRIVERS-1560; testing that KMS TLS connections verify peer certificates, test infrastructure addition.
Improvement implementing snapshot reads on secondaries per spec; proactive spec feature implementation, not a nonconformance bug.
Adding optional GridFS partial download feature permitted by spec; spec says 'not required,' so no nonconformance, feature addition.
Issue split DRIVERS-776, Improvement; adding 'let' option for aggregate command, proactive spec feature rollout.
Issue split DRIVERS-820, Improvement; exposing document validation failure reason, proactive spec feature addition.
Avoiding compiler warnings with -Wfloat-equal; internal code quality fix, no spec behavior.
Issue split DRIVERS-812, Improvement; adding Azure/GCP keystores in FLE, proactive spec feature rollout not a nonconformance.
Test utility produces misleading failure explanation; internal test helper improvement, no spec behavior.
Compilation failure with glibc 2.34 due to old Catch2 version; build/dependency issue, no spec behavior.
Issue split DRIVERS-1438/1774/1779, Improvement; implementing time-series collection support, proactive spec rollout.
Issue split DRIVERS-2226; fixing server version incompatibility for bulkWrite let-support spec tests, test infrastructure fix.
Issue split DRIVERS-1130; converting CRUD v2 spec tests to unified test format, test infrastructure migration.
Issue split DRIVERS-744; adding missing tests for aggregation pipeline in bulk write updates, test infrastructure.
Depends DRIVERS-827; separating BulkWrite tests by operation type, test infrastructure reorganization.
Depends DRIVERS-970; adding tests that drivers raise error for hint on unacknowledged deletes, test infrastructure.
CRUD spec changed to require error when hint given on any unacknowledged write; driver must raise error per updated spec rule.
Depends DRIVERS-1260; testing arrayFilters on non-supporting server for subsequent bulkWrite ops, test infrastructure.
Depends DRIVERS-1298; adding tests for update/replacement validation in write operations, test infrastructure.
Issue split DRIVERS-1590; removing support for deprecated platform builds, CI/build infrastructure change.
find_one_and_* raises unexpected exception with unacknowledged write concern; spec requires these operations to work, driver crashes instead.
Issue split DRIVERS-2210; fixing server version incompatibility for updateOne/updateMany-let spec tests, test infrastructure fix.
read_preference::tags() takes document instead of array; API ergonomics issue, no specific spec rule violated.
GitHub Pages SSL misconfiguration for mongocxx.org website; hosting/infrastructure issue, no spec behavior.
Issue split DRIVERS-742, Improvement; adding 'comment' field support to all helpers, proactive spec feature rollout.
Issue split DRIVERS-2192; fixing comment helper specification tests, test infrastructure fix.
Issue split DRIVERS-2243; fixing inherited comment causing OperationFailure on older MongoDB, spec test compatibility fix.
